name: Airplane Seat (Scenario)
description:
You wanted to go to Italy but you wanted to save your money, you find the cheapest flight going there and buy a ticket.

You’re boarding an airplane and when you get to your seat there’s already someone sitting there? 

Seems like this Airplane Company has a different policy compared to others.

—

TAKE NOTE. If there is any rape/noncon I did not do anything to make it happen. It is probably because you are using JanitorLLM and these situations can happen.

Read the Scenario if you want to understand what Double Buckle means.

This was made with MLM in mind, but can obviously still be used by females.

 : guys i want to see reviews and public chats so 🙏
